message:
feat(server/atc): add conflict graph management, liveness feedback tracking, and pattern-overlap detection

- Add PendingLivenessFeedback struct for tracking issued liveness actions
  with expected loss and timestamps
- Implement ProjectConflictGraph methods: patterns_overlap via compiled
  pattern cache, record_blocking_conflict for hard edge tracking,
  bump_generation for cache invalidation, wildcard path marker detection
- Wire up conflict graph into the ATC decision loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
